title: valerianella eriocarpa var. microcyathus
intro: Valerianella eriocarpa var. microcyathus is a variety of the Valerianella eriocarpa plant, commonly known as 'mouse ear' or 'corn salad', a type of leafy green vegetable that belongs to the family Valerianaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Valerianella eriocarpa var. microcyathus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Valerianella eriocarpa var. microcyathus can be consumed as a fresh leafy green vegetable, used in salads, or prepared as a tea, infusion, or supplement to reap its potential health benefits.
